channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street lights GE Bishops Cleeve, 10th May
item.description:
Its great being able to cycle to the club off the road, from cleeve. I do wonder though if the lights will be fixed by then. The street lights on the section by GE currently aren't working. Makes the road and cycle way very dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southam Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Y10 svr, 10th May
item.description:
Vehicle parking without mot and tax
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penrose Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on pavement on corner of Ismay rd/Welch rd, 10th May
item.description:
I've reported this before and some guys have come out and fixed it very badly indeed. The whole pavement needs resurfacing and it's cracked and uneven and crumbling. Trying to steer a wheelchair is a nightmare and it must be so bad for elderly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Ismay Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pot hole on middle lane of roundabout, 9th May
item.description:
Your tyres get stuck in the large rut caused by this pot hole . People swerve to avoid it and drift in to other lanes of traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge, 9th May
item.description:
Overgrown hedge now causing issues on the pedestrian side of the cycle path. Please can this be cut back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 9th May
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to dog waste bin: 0273 What3words location: ///lunge.laminate.fittingly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Fallen tree across the bridleway, 9th May
item.description:
On the main bridlepath, coming from the Green Dragon end, before the pond/drainage section.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped chairs/ sofa, 9th May
item.description:
Just opposite the old Arle nurseries before the new estate, just after the turn for Pilgrove way there are sofa bits / arm chair fly tipped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th May
item.description:
Christmas trees been here 5 months Rubbish starting to accumulate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Portland Square, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Road is uneven and broken in many places causing damage to vehicles, 9th May
item.description:
The road needs a complete road wide patch to solve the uneven and broken camber What three words location: reader.fists.fussy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold

item.title: 20 inch pot hole in road, 9th May

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th May
item.description:
Fly tipping. More than 4 refuse sacks presented 4 days before collection day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Hales Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes close together on the line dividing lane one and lane two, 8th May
item.description:
Two potholes close together on the line dividing lane one and lane two , on the roundabout, on the west side, adjacent to Longlevens. Could they be reviewed and ideally repaired please ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 8th May
item.description:
Railway Bridge sign fallen off. Has been collected by crew on E70013494. Will need reattaching
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Massive dangerous potholes, 8th May
item.description:
You really can't miss it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Footpath sign rusted and leaning, 8th May
item.description:
At the corner of Pirton Lane and small lane by the railway bridge. Next to the red telephone box in the corner of the garden of Browbridge, Pirton Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
